message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on monday and should depart from kings lynn
The train should arrive by 11:15 and should go to cambridge
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 6 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the north and should serve chinese food
The restaurant should be in the moderate price range
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 14:30 on the same day
If the booking fails how about 13:30
Make sure you get the reference number
